overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a fur cloak exploring a burning gothic temple complex. The character walks through covered colonnades, interior halls with golden light, and approaches a massive cathedral under a fiery red sky with the Erdtree burning in the background, eventually ascending toward a radiant light portal.

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the massive burning Erdtree in the sky
character enters the building through a large stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway toward the building entrance

entered.detail: tall stone columns supporting the covered walkway roof
massive tree engulfed in red flames visible through the archway openings
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the walkway
large ornate stone building with pointed arches and intricate carvings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone colonnade with the massive burning Erdtree visible in the distance. The camera pans up to reveal the fiery sky before the character approaches and enters a large stone archway into the building interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand interior hall with golden hanging roots

events.description: entered the building from the covered colonnade into golden-lit interior
approaching the exit archway leading back outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the ornate interior passage with golden light filtering through hanging roots

entered.detail: large ornate stone arch marking the entrance to the interior
thick tree roots hanging from the ceiling emitting golden light
decorated stone columns lining the interior hall
polished wooden floor in the large central hall
tall standing candelabras with multiple lit candles

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the character walks through a grand hall illuminated by golden hanging roots and candlelight. The space features ornate stone pillars and a polished wooden floor section before approaching the exit back to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stone balcony under fiery red sky

events.description: exited the building onto an open balcony with panoramic view of the burning sky
character begins ascending the grand staircase toward the cathedral

agents.ego_description: walking across the open terrace toward the cathedral entrance with the fiery sky overhead

entered.detail: ornate stone railing along the edge of the terrace
sky filled with red and orange flames and falling embers
corpses lying on the stone pavement near the stairs
wide stone staircase leading up to the cathedral entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open balcony, the character walks across the stone terrace under a sky burning with red flames. Dead bodies lie near the wide staircase leading up to the cathedral facade, which grows larger as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral approach with grand staircase and bodies

events.description: began climbing the grand stone staircase toward the cathedral entrance
entered the cathedral through the large arched doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the cathedral entrance, passing corpses on the ground

entered.detail: wide ornate stairs with carved stone railings leading up to the entrance
massive arched doorway with intricate stone carvings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase toward the cathedral entrance, passing between stone statues and dead bodies. The massive Gothic facade looms larger until the character reaches and enters the arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral interior ascending toward radiant light

events.description: entered the dark cathedral interior from the exterior stairs
approaching the bright radiant light at the top of the interior stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the interior stairs toward the radiant light portal at the end of the hall

entered.detail: stairs inside the cathedral with tall columns on either side
massive cylindrical pillars supporting the cathedral ceiling
bright beam of light illuminating the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit cathedral, the character ascends the interior staircase flanked by massive stone columns. The scene is dominated by a radiant beam of light at the far end of the hall, toward which the character walks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a burning exterior colonnade through a grand interior hall and back out into a fiery wasteland, ultimately ascending into a radiant cathedral. It begins with the character walking through a stone colonnade under a fiery sky, panning upward to reveal the burning Erdtree before passing through a large archway into the building. The scene then shifts to a grand interior hall illuminated by golden hanging roots and candlelight, moving across polished wooden floors before emerging onto an open stone balcony. As the character crosses the terrace under a red sky, the camera follows them past fallen bodies and up a grand staircase toward the looming Gothic facade of a massive cathedral. Finally, the movement carries the character through the arched doorway and up an interior staircase flanked by stone columns, drawing closer to a dominant, radiant beam of light at the far end of the hall.
